mapper.select: select category_id,name,parent_id from categories where parent_id IS NULL order by category_id
select category_id,name,parent_id from categories where parent_id=#{parent_id} order by category_id
select parent_id from categories where category_id=#{category_id}
select name from categories where category_id=#{category_id}
SELECT * FROM categories WHERE parent_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY parent_id, category_id
